title: carduus scardicus
intro: Carduus scardicus, also known as the Balkan thistle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Carduus scardicus has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are attributed to its flavonoid and saponin content. The health benefits of Carduus scardicus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support kidney function. Herbal preparations of Carduus scardicus are often made from its leaves and flowers, which can be infused in tea or used to make a tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
